author: Jayteare
name: 11L Adaptive Markov + Int6/Int8 Mixed Quant + 786K Batch
blurb: 11-layer 512-dim GPT with adaptive Markov mixing: a unigram transition table is mixed with transformer logits using a learned per-position gate with confidence-based thresholding. Per-row int6 quantization on MLP/attention weights, int8 on embeddings/Markov table, fp16 passthrough for control tensors. Zstd-22 compression recovers wasted bits from 6-bit values stored as int8. 786K token batch for higher data throughput per step. GQA with 8 heads / 4 KV heads, tied embeddings, relu-squared MLP.
